title: Configuration
noConfigDescription: Could not load the configuration. Please check the server.

gateway.hostTip: The host address the gateway listens on
gateway.portTip: The port the gateway listens on
gateway.tokenManaged: Token is managed via environment variable
gateway.ownerIdsTip: Comma-separated list of owner user IDs with full admin access
gateway.allowedOriginsTip: CORS allowed origins for the HTTP API
gateway.maxMessageCharsTip: Maximum number of characters per inbound message
gateway.rateLimitRpmTip: Maximum requests per minute per user
gateway.inboundDebounceMsTip: Debounce delay in milliseconds for inbound messages

behavior.uxDescription: Toggle UX features like tool status indicators and reply blocking
behavior.rateLimitDescription: Control message rate limits and debounce settings
behavior.securityDescription: Input guard and credential scrubbing settings
behavior.toolStatusHint: Show tool execution status to users
behavior.toolStatusInfo: Users will see which tools the agent is using
behavior.blockReplyHint: Block messages while agent is responding
behavior.blockReplyInfo: Prevents users from sending new messages while the agent is processing
behavior.intentClassifyInfo: Enables intent classification for smarter routing
behavior.injectionActionHint: Action to take when prompt injection is detected
behavior.injectionBlockInfo: Messages detected as injection attempts will be blocked
behavior.scrubCredentialsInfo: API keys and tokens will be redacted from tool results

sessions.scopeTip: How sessions are scoped (per-user, per-chat, etc.)

agents.title: AI Defaults
agents.maxToolIterationsTip: Maximum number of tool call iterations per request
agents.contextWindowTip: Maximum context window size in tokens
agents.workspaceTip: Default workspace directory for file operations
agents.restrictToWorkspaceTip: Restrict file operations to the workspace directory

subagents.title: Subagents
subagents.maxConcurrentTip: Maximum number of concurrently running subagents
subagents.maxSpawnDepthTip: Maximum depth of nested subagent spawning
subagents.maxChildrenPerAgentTip: Maximum number of child subagents per parent agent
subagents.archiveAfterMinTip: Archive completed subagent sessions after this many minutes
subagents.modelOverrideTip: Override the model used for subagents

memory.title: Memory
memory.embeddingModelTip: Model to use for generating embeddings
memory.maxResultsTip: Maximum number of memory results to retrieve
memory.minScoreTip: Minimum similarity score for memory retrieval

compaction.title: Compaction
compaction.desc: Context compaction settings to manage token usage
compaction.reserveTokensFloorTip: Minimum number of tokens to reserve for new messages
compaction.maxHistoryShareTip: Maximum share of context window for conversation history

pruning.title: Pruning
pruning.desc: Message pruning settings for long conversations
pruning.keepLastAssistantsTip: Number of recent assistant messages to keep during pruning

sandbox.title: Sandbox
sandbox.desc: Docker sandbox settings for code execution
sandbox.imageTip: Docker image to use for the sandbox
sandbox.memoryMbTip: Memory limit for the sandbox container
sandbox.cpusTip: CPU limit for the sandbox container
sandbox.timeoutSecTip: Maximum execution time for sandbox commands

quota.title: Quota
quota.description: Usage quotas and rate limiting per user/channel/provider
quota.defaultLimitsTip: Default usage limits applied to all users
quota.providerOverridesTip: Override quota limits per LLM provider

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Tool access control and execution settings
tools.profileTip: Tool profile (determines which tools are available)
tools.alsoAllowTip: Additional allowed tools (appended to allow list)
tools.execAskModeTip: How to handle execution approval requests

cron.title: Cron
cron.maxRetriesTip: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed cron jobs

telemetry.title: Telemetry
telemetry.insecureTip: Allow insecure (non-TLS) connections to the collector
telemetry.headersTip: Additional headers for the OTel exporter
